text.title: Context Window Curation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a bundle by scope → AGENTS.md → budget → emit. Branches name observable bundle features.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: bounded task, repo with AGENTS.md, token budget set?

branch.question: Is the task scoped (one feature / bug / refactor, not exploratory)?
Is AGENTS.md (or local equivalent) included in files[]?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → scoped (TICKET-4421) → AGENTS.md present (1200 tokens) → total=4200 ≤ budget=6000 → verdict=commit-bundle (ref run-the-checklist).
